races.name: Dragonborn
races.description: Dragonborn look distinctly draconic, with horns, slitted eyes, and massive builds.

races.name: Dwarf
races.description: Bold and hardy, dwarves are known as skilled warriors, miners, and workers of stone and metal.

races.name: Elf
races.description: Elves are a magical people of otherworldly grace, living in the world but not entirely part of it.

races.name: Gnome
races.description: A gnome's energy and enthusiasm for living shines through every inch of his or her body.

races.name: Half-Elf
races.description: Half-elves' blend of human practicality and elven grace gives them unique perspectives.

races.name: Half-Orc
races.description: Half-orcs' grayish pigmentation, sloping foreheads, and protruding teeth make their orcish heritage plain for all to see.

races.name: Halfling
races.description: The diminutive halflings have proven to be resilient to the perils of the world and have adapted to nearly every land.

races.name: Human
races.description: Humans are the most adaptable and ambitious people among the common races. Whatever drives them, humans are the innovators, the achievers, and the pioneers of the worlds.

races.name: Tiefling
races.description: To be greeted with stares and whispers, to suffer violence and insult on the street, to see mistrust and fear in every eye: this is the lot of the tiefling.
